usd_reason: The dollar is rising because investors think US interest rates might go up soon
gold_reason: Higher US interest rates make gold less attractive to investors
indices_reason: The stock market is falling because the new Fed chairman's first meeting did not go as well as expected
lead_story: The US dollar is at a one-year high due to expectations of higher interest rates, the new Fed chairman Kevin Warsh is making changes, and the stock market had its worst day under a new Fed chair in decades, all of which are driving market trends right now, with investors closely watching the Fed's next moves, and the potential impact on the economy
